name: ALERT - Farm Attention Digest
description: Phase 10 thin Telegram digest workflow. Backend owns farm attention rules; n8n only calls the read-only summary endpoint, throttles duplicates, and delivers to Telegram.

nodes.name: Code - Format Telegram Farm Attention Digest

parameters.content: Phase 10 farm attention digest. Backend source only: /api/reports/farm-attention-summary. Keep inactive and dryRun=true until manual read-only, no-send, and duplicate-suppression checks pass. Do not add Google Sheets reads/writes or duplicate attention rules in n8n.

main.node: Code - Format Telegram Farm Attention Digest
